title: Supporting data for autoencoder-based gradual damage warning for ship structures
manuscript_title: A Gradual Damage Suspicion Warning Method for Ship Structures Based on Autoencoder Health Manifold Modeling
description: Preprocessed strain-response matrices, measurement metadata, baseline validation results, pretrained autoencoder model, and analysis scripts supporting the manuscript.

data_files.description: Healthy strain-response samples used for autoencoder training and validation.

reason_for_exclusion: The excluded files contain detailed ship structural model information and unpublished institutional research materials. The shared matrices and metadata directly support the reported autoencoder validation and damage-detection analyses.
